description: A plain screenshot of a Donald J. Trump social-media post (Truth Social / X style), not a designed graphic. At the top is the rounded profile avatar (a stylized U.S.-flag-painted face), the name 'Donald J. Trump' with a verified badge and an additional badge icon, and the handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The body is black text on a white background in several paragraphs. It states that when 'President Xi very elegantly referred to the United States as perhaps being a declining nation,' he was referring to damage from 'the four years of Sleepy Joe Biden' (citing 'open borders, high taxes, transgender for everybody, men in women's sports, DEI, horrible trade deals, rampant crime'), and contrasts that with the 'incredible rise' over '16 spectacular months of the Trump Administration' (all-time high stock markets and 401Ks, 'military victory and thriving relationship in Venezuela, the military decimation of Iran (to be continued!),' a record '18 trillion dollars being invested,' the 'best U.S. job market in history,' and 'ending country destroying DEI'). It concludes that the U.S. is now 'the hottest Nation anywhere in the world' and hopes relations with China will be stronger than ever. This is a reposted text statement, not an agency-designed meme or poster.
notable_text: '...the incredible rise that the United States has displayed to the world during the 16 spectacular months of the Trump Administration...' — @realDonaldTrump
